sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_controlpower_t (personnelid,forcetype,personname,birthdate,sexes,interesting,speciality,partyduty,duty,nickname,education,telephone,address,lifeplace,workunit,records,actualstate,purposetask,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$forcetype$,'$personname$','$birthdate$','$sexes$','$interesting$','$speciality$','$partyduty$','$duty$','$nickname$','$education$','$telephone$','$address$','$lifeplace$', '$workunit$','$records$','$actualstate$','$purposetask$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_controlpower_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_controlpower_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t2.forcetype=$forcetype$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_controlpower_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.personnelid = $personnelid$ AND t2.forcetype=$forcetype$

SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_controlpower_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.forcetype=$forcetype$
t2.personnelid = $personnelid$
t2.id in ($ids$)
SELECT * FROM p_kong_controlpower_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
select * from p_kong_public_relation_t where controlpowerid=#controlpowerid# and validflag>0 and relationtype=#relationtype# limit 4
select * from( select * from p_kong_public_resume_t where controlpowerid=#controlpowerid# and validflag>0 order by endtime desc limit 5)A order by A.endtime
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_public_resume_t (controlpowerid,starttime,endtime,workdetails,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($controlpowerid$,'$starttime$','$endtime$','$workdetails$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_public_resume_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_kong_controlpower_t t1, p_kong_public_resume_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.controlpowerid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_kong_controlpower_t t1, p_kong_public_resume_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.controlpowerid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$
SELECT count(1) FROM p_kong_public_resume_t t2 WHERE t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_kong_public_resume_t t2 WHERE t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$
SELECT * FROM p_kong_public_resume_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_public_relation_t (controlpowerid,relationtype,appellation,relationname,politicalposition,workdetails,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) VALUES ($controlpowerid$,$relationtype$,'$appellation$','$relationname$','$politicalposition$','$workdetails$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_public_relation_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_kong_controlpower_t t1, p_kong_public_relation_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.controlpowerid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$ and relationtype= $relationtype$

SELECT t2.* FROM p_kong_controlpower_t t1, p_kong_public_relation_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.controlpowerid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.controlpowerid = $controlpowerid$ and relationtype= $relationtype$
SELECT * FROM p_kong_public_relation_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO p_kong_background_t (personnelid,datatype,checktime,checktype,checkresume,attachments,validflag,addoperator,addtime,updateoperator,updatetime,memo) VALUES ($personnelid$,$datatype$,'$checktime$','$checktype$','$checkresume$','$attachments$',1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE p_kong_background_t SET validflag=0, updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(1) FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_background_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.personnelid = $personnelid$ and t2.datatype= $datatype$
SELECT t2.* FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_background_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.personnelid = $personnelid$ and t2.datatype= $datatype$
SELECT * FROM p_kong_background_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

SELECT t2.updatetime as checktime,CONCAT(t2.checktype,'-',t2.checktime) as checktype FROM p_personnel_t t1, p_kong_background_t t2 WHERE t1.validflag > 0 AND t1.id = t2.personnelid AND t2.validflag > 0 AND t2.personnelid = $personnelid$ and t2.datatype= $datatype$ order by t2.updatetime LIMIT 3
